questions.question: In the `update_uid` action, when a `qc_pending` item with NO issues is scanned and the product category is Watches, what status is assigned?

options.text: `qc_verified` ‚Äî directly verified
`qc_cooling` ‚Äî enters cooling period
`qc_failed` ‚Äî auto-failed for Watches
`components_requested` ‚Äî needs component check

questions.question: What system option controls the cooling period duration, and how is it used in `get_uid_details`?

options.text: `qcBlockTime` ‚Äî blocks scanning for N minutes after each scan
`qcCoolingTime` ‚Äî hours added to cooling start time; if `strtotime($coolingStart + hours) > now`, item is still in cooling
`processBlockTime` ‚Äî minutes until process is blocked system-wide
`coolingDuration` ‚Äî days until cooling expires per category

questions.question: In `update_uid`, when a `qc_pending` item with NO issues is scanned and the category is NOT Watches, which `$stockist` method is called immediately?

options.text: Only `$stockist->update_inventory_status()` ‚Äî marketplace sync happens later
`$stockist->add_inventory_log()` ‚Äî only log entry is created
`$stockist->update_stock_on_mps('pid', $inv_id)` ‚Äî marketplace sync is called directly
`$stockist->setExpectedLocation()` ‚Äî only location is updated

questions.question: What does the `qc_reject` action's 5th parameter (`TRUE`) in `$stockist->update_inventory_status($uid, 'qc_pending', FALSE, FALSE, TRUE)` enable?

options.text: Forces a location reassignment
Enables batch auto-close
Triggers de-reservation (decrements `committed_stock`)
Sends an automated Slack notification

questions.question: What does the `processBlockTime` option control in the QAQC module?

options.text: Maximum time allotted per item scan
Time after which QC failures are blocked for the day, enforcing work-timeline cutoff
Cooling period multiplier for priority items
Maximum concurrent users allowed in QC station

questions.question: In `update_uid_repairs`, how does the system determine that an item should transition from `qc_failed` to `qc_pending`?

options.text: When the technician clicks a "Complete Repair" button regardless of issue status
When ALL issues in the JSON map have been toggled to `TRUE` (all fixed) and no components are requested
When the batch timer expires
When `$stockist->update_inventory_status()` returns a success flag

questions.question: What special restriction applies to repair batches with `reason == 'RMA Repair'` in `update_uid_repairs`?

options.text: They cannot be auto-closed ‚Äî only manual close is allowed
They bypass the $stockist mediation pattern
The technician can ONLY set the status to `components_requested` ‚Äî not qc_pending or qc_failed
They require supervisor approval before status changes

questions.question: When a repair technician marks some but NOT all issues as fixed in the JSON map, and no components are requested, what status does the item receive?

options.text: `qc_pending` ‚Äî sent back for full re-QC
`qc_failed` ‚Äî remains failed since issues persist
`components_requested` ‚Äî defaults to requesting components
`qc_cooling` ‚Äî enters cooling for re-evaluation

questions.question: In the repair flow, what happens when the `TBL_INVENTORY_STATE` counter (scoped to the batch ID) reaches 0 after a repair action?

options.text: A new batch is automatically created
The state row is deleted and the batch is auto-closed (status='1', closedBy, closedDate set)
The counter resets to its initial value
Only the state row is deleted ‚Äî batch remains open

questions.question: What are the three possible values of the `isImperfect` field on `TBL_INVENTORY`, and what does each represent?

options.text: `0` = never inspected, `1` = inspected OK, `2` = inspected failed
`0` = normal product, `1` = approved imperfect, `2` = pending imperfect approval
`0` = not imperfect, `1` = minor imperfect, `2` = major imperfect
`0` = new, `1` = refurbished, `2` = graded

questions.question: When `approve_liquidation` sets `inv_status='liquidated'`, what does the `before_update_inventory` trigger do?

options.text: Sends a notification to the warehouse manager
Archives the item's log history to a separate table
Clears `box_id`, `ctn_id`, `expectedLocation`, `currentLocation`, and `inv_batch` to NULL
Moves the item to a special liquidation carton (ctn_id=3099)

questions.question: In `get_uid_repairs`, what prevents a liquidation-requested item from being processed through the repair flow?

options.text: The `$stockist->update_inventory_status()` call rejects it
The `liquidationRequested` field is checked ‚Äî if `'1'`, a `'Liquidation requested for this product!'` info message is returned, blocking repair
The batch validation fails for liquidation items
A database constraint prevents status changes on liquidation-requested items

questions.question: In `update_uid`, when the `TBL_INVENTORY_STATE` counter reaches 0 for a `qc_pending` Watches carton, what tasks are generated?

options.text: Only an inventory move task
An inventory move task AND a QC cooling task ‚Äî `$task->addTask('inventory', 'move', $ctnId)` + `$task->addTask('qc', 'qc_cooling', $ctnId)`
A QC verification task only
No tasks ‚Äî the UI handles the next step

questions.question: How is `TBL_INVENTORY_STATE.count` initialized when no active state exists for the user and category during `update_uid`?

options.text: Set to the total carton capacity from `TBL_INVENTORY_CTN`
Set to 1 (assumes only the current item)
Counts remaining items in the carton with the same `inv_status` and `inv_batch`, then subtracts 1 for the current item
Imported from the GRN item quantity

questions.question: In the complete P2 pipeline, at which exact stage does inventory first become available on Shopify and Flipkart?

options.text: When GRN inbound is processed
When `inv_status` changes to `qc_cooling`
When `inv_status` changes to `qc_verified` ‚Äî at which point `$stockist->update_stock_on_mps()` fires
When the item is physically moved to a `STK%` location

questions.question: In the P2 pipeline, what happens to an item that enters the failure‚Üírepair loop: `qc_failed` ‚Üí repair batch ‚Üí all issues fixed ‚Üí `qc_pending` ‚Üí re-scan?

options.text: The item skips cooling and goes directly to `qc_verified` regardless of category
The item follows normal `update_uid` logic again ‚Äî Watches get cooling, non-Watches get verified
The item is automatically set to `qc_verified` after repair completion
The item goes to a supervisor queue for manual approval

questions.question: What does the `before_update_bas_inventory` trigger do when QAQC changes an item's `expectedLocation` via `$stockist->update_inventory_status()`?

options.text: Copies the old location to `TBL_INVENTORY_LOG`
Sets `currentLocation = NULL` if the new `expectedLocation != currentLocation`, forcing physical re-scan
Updates all items in the same carton to match the new location
Sends a move task notification to the warehouse system

questions.question: When ALL items in a lot pass QC verification, what does the `sendSlackNotification()` function do?

options.text: Updates `TBL_PRODUCTS_MASTER` with verification timestamp
Sets `TBL_PURCHASE_GRN.grn_notification_sent='1'` to prevent duplicate notifications, then sends Slack messages to users 1, 2, 10 with a link to the GRN report
Triggers `update_stock_on_mps()` for all items in the lot simultaneously
Creates a task for the warehouse manager to review the lot
